storyline_timeline.summary:
**Anthropic推出最强公开模型Claude Fable 5及Mythos 5**

Anthropic于6月9日发布Claude Fable 5和Claude Mythos 5两款AI模型。Fable 5面向公众开放，是该公司目前公开可用能力最强的模型，在软件工程、科研等领域表现卓越。Mythos 5则保留更完整能力，仅向少量受信任机构开放。两款模型定价均为每百万输入10美元、每百万输出50美元。

clusters.headline: SpaceX IPO估值1.75万亿美元，引发市场争议与中东资金追捧
clusters.summary: SpaceX将于6月12日上市，计划以1.75万亿美元估值融资750亿美元，成为史上最大IPO。空头大师查诺斯质疑其估值靠“希望和梦想”支撑，而中东财富基金已认购数十亿美元。分析认为其业务包含太空、芯片和AI三大高风险领域。
clusters.headline_en: SpaceX IPO valued at $1.75 trillion, sparking market controversy and Middle Eastern capital pursuit
clusters.summary_en: SpaceX will go public on June 12, planning to raise $75 billion at a $1.75 trillion valuation, making it the largest IPO in history. Short-selling master Chanos questioned its valuation being supported by "hope and dreams," while Middle Eastern wealth funds have subscribed tens of billions of dollars. Analysts believe its business includes three high-risk areas: space, chips, and AI.

confirmed_claims: 因安全顾虑，Anthropic 最强 AI 模型 Claude Fable 5 拒绝回答基础生物问题
IT之家 6 月 11 日消息，Anthropic 昨日推出了 ClaudeFable 5，称其为该公司目前面向大众开放的最强人工智能模型，并着重夸赞了其在生物学等领域的能力。但这款模型却无法解答高中生本应掌握的基础生物问题，而是会将相关提问转接给此前的旗舰模型 Claude Opus 4.8。
Microsoft запретила сотрудникам использовать Claude Fable 5 — компанию смутили правила хранения данных
Microsoft ограничила доступ своих сотрудников к новой ИИ-модели Claude Fable 5 от компании Anthropic.
Microsoft restricts Claude Fable for employees over data retention concerns

clusters.headline: Anthropic发布最强AI模型Claude Fable 5，因安全限制拒绝回答基础生物问题
clusters.summary: Anthropic于6月9日推出其首个面向公众的Mythos级AI模型Claude Fable 5，在软件工程和视觉任务上表现优异，但因安全顾虑在生物、化学等领域设置严格限制，甚至拒绝回答高中生物问题。微软因数据保留政策限制员工使用该模型。
clusters.headline_en: Anthropic releases its most powerful AI model Claude Fable 5, refuses to answer basic biology questions due to safety restrictions
clusters.summary_en: On June 9, Anthropic launched its first Mythos-level AI model for the public, Claude Fable 5, which excels in software engineering and visual tasks but imposes strict restrictions in fields like biology and chemistry due to safety concerns, even refusing to answer high school biology questions. Microsoft restricts employees from using the model due to data retention policies.

clusters.headline_en: Bill Gates Testifies Before US Congress on Epstein Ties

欧州で広がる米国不信 「同盟国」は11%、1年半で半減 世論調査 ベルリン=藤原学思 欧州15カ国の国民のうち、米国を「同盟国」とみなしているのは、わずか11%――。シンクタンク「欧州外交問題評議会」（ECFR）が10日、5月に実施した世論調査の結果を発表した。1年半前は22%、半年前は16%で、対米不信の広がりが顕著に表れている。

clusters.headline: 欧洲对美信任度跌至历史新低，仅11%视美国为盟友
clusters.summary: 欧洲外交关系委员会6月10日发布的民调显示，欧洲15国中仅11%的受访者将美国视为盟友，较2024年11月的22%大幅下降。25%的受访者视美国为竞争对手或敌国。调查反映出欧洲人对美国安全承诺的深度不信任，并支持增加国防开支和战略自主。
clusters.headline_en: European trust in US hits historic low, only 11% see US as ally
clusters.summary_en: A poll released by the European Council on Foreign Relations on June 10 shows that only 11% of respondents in 15 European countries view the US as an ally, a sharp drop from 22% in November 2024. 25% of respondents see the US as a competitor or enemy. The survey reflects deep European distrust of US security commitments and supports increased defense spending and strategic autonomy.

clusters.headline: 独立音乐人起诉谷歌擅用YouTube歌曲训练Lyria AI模型
clusters.summary: 一群独立音乐人起诉谷歌，指控其未经授权使用他们上传至YouTube的歌曲训练音乐AI模型Lyria 3。谷歌提交驳回动议，辩称用户上传内容时已授予广泛许可，但拒绝明确承认是否使用YouTube视频训练Lyria。
clusters.headline_en: Independent Musicians Sue Google for Using YouTube Songs to Train Lyria AI Model Without Permission
clusters.summary_en: A group of independent musicians has sued Google, accusing it of using their songs uploaded to YouTube to train the music AI model Lyria 3 without authorization. Google filed a motion to dismiss, arguing that users grant broad licenses when uploading content, but refused to explicitly acknowledge whether YouTube videos were used to train Lyria.

storyline_timeline.title: 谷歌推出 DiffusionGemma 文本扩散模型：本地 AI 推理速度提升 4 倍
storyline_timeline.summary: Chips & Hardware

confirmed_claims: 谷歌推出 DiffusionGemma 文本扩散模型：本地 AI 推理速度提升 4 倍
IT之家 6 月 11 日消息，谷歌今天（6 月 11 日）发布公告，宣布推出 DiffusionGemma，是基于文本扩散机制的开放 AI 模型， 相比较自回归模型在本地推理速度上提升了 4 倍。
谷歌推出DiffusionGemma：文本生成四倍提速，主攻本地实时应用场景
谷歌发布开源实验性模型DiffusionGemma，采用文本扩散技术，在专用GPU上实现最高四倍的文本生成加速，为开发者在低延迟本地工作流场景中提供了新的技术路径。
Google DeepMind releases DiffusionGemma, a model that runs local AI 4x faster
Another day, another AI model from Google.
clusters.evidence_summary: 3 sources assessed; 6 claim(s) have source support.
clusters.headline: 谷歌推出DiffusionGemma文本扩散模型，本地推理速度提升4倍
clusters.summary: 谷歌DeepMind于6月11日发布开源实验性模型DiffusionGemma，采用文本扩散技术，在本地GPU上实现最高4倍的文本生成加速。模型为26B参数的MoE架构，推理时仅激活3.8B参数，在H100上每秒生成超1000个token。但输出质量低于标准Gemma 4。
clusters.headline_en: Google launches DiffusionGemma text diffusion model, local inference speed increased by 4 times
clusters.summary_en: Google DeepMind released the open-source experimental model DiffusionGemma on June 11, using text diffusion technology to achieve up to 4x text generation acceleration on local GPUs. The model is a 26B-parameter MoE architecture, activating only 3.8B parameters during inference, generating over 1000 tokens per second on H100. However, output quality is lower than standard Gemma 4.

**中国央行连续第19个月增持黄金**

中国人民银行数据显示，5月末黄金储备报7496万盎司，环比增加32万盎司，为连续第19个月增持。同期外汇储备规模为34422亿美元，较4月末上升317亿美元。分析认为此举旨在降低对美元资产的依赖。

storyline_timeline.summary:
**纽约联储调查：美国求职者前景预期恶化，通胀预期小幅回落**

纽约联邦储备银行5月消费者预期调查显示，美国人对劳动力市场看法转向悲观。认为未来12个月内能找到工作的受访者比例降至43.7%，为去年12月以来最低；预期失业概率升至15.1%。同时，一年期通胀预期从3.6%小幅回落至3.5%。消费者财务状况评估恶化。

SpaceX CEO埃隆·马斯克在IPO前夕发布视频，首次详细披露轨道AI数据中心计划。第一代AI卫星“AI1”峰值功耗150千瓦，翼展70米，将部署在低地球轨道。马斯克称技术已成熟，目标2027年底前实现年化1GW算力部署，并最终扩展至太瓦级。但行业分析认为经济可行性存疑。

clusters.headline: 民调显示新西兰人十年来首次认为美国威胁大于中国
clusters.summary: 亚洲新西兰基金会6月10日发布的年度民调显示，39%的新西兰人视美国为朋友，35%视为威胁；而43%视中国为朋友，23%视为威胁。这是十年来新西兰人首次认为美国威胁大于中国，主要受贸易中断和全球不稳定担忧影响。
clusters.headline_en: Poll shows New Zealanders view US as greater threat than China for first time in a decade
clusters.summary_en: An annual poll released by the Asia New Zealand Foundation on June 10 shows that 39% of New Zealanders see the US as a friend and 35% as a threat, while 43% see China as a friend and 23% as a threat. This is the first time in a decade that New Zealanders view the US as a greater threat than China, mainly due to concerns over trade disruptions and global instability.

clusters.headline_en: NASA announces Artemis III crew, first European astronaut included
clusters.summary_en: NASA announced the Artemis III crew on June 9, including three American astronauts and Italian astronaut Luca Parmitano, marking the first European astronaut to participate in an Artemis mission. The mission plans to test docking capabilities of SpaceX's Starship and Blue Origin's Blue Moon in low Earth orbit in 2027.

storyline_timeline.summary:

美国众议院6月9日以214-212票通过《安全美国法案》，为移民和海关执法局（ICE）及边境巡逻队提供约700亿美元资金，覆盖至2029年。法案将送交特朗普总统签署。民主党批评此举是给ICE开空白支票，缺乏监督。

clusters.headline_en: Valve stops selling physical Steam gift cards due to fraud

clusters.summary: 苹果与欧盟委员会就Siri AI未能在欧洲上线相互指责。苹果称欧盟《数字市场法》要求其向竞争对手开放用户数据，威胁隐私安全；欧盟则称决定权在苹果，并拒绝其18个月豁免请求。Siri AI将随iOS 27发布，但欧盟用户暂无法使用。
clusters.headline_en: Apple and EU trade blame over delayed Siri AI launch
clusters.summary_en: Apple and the European Commission are blaming each other for Siri AI not launching in Europe. Apple says the EU's Digital Markets Act requires it to open user data to competitors, threatening privacy; the EU says the decision lies with Apple and rejected its 18-month exemption request. Siri AI will be released with iOS 27, but EU users will not be able to use it for now.

storyline_timeline.summary:
**亚美尼亚总理帕什尼扬宣布赢得议会选举，巩固亲西方路线**

亚美尼亚总理尼科尔·帕什尼扬领导的公民契约党在议会选举中以49.8%得票率获胜，巩固了该国亲西方转向。此次选举被视为对俄罗斯影响力的考验。帕什尼扬承诺继续深化与欧盟合作，同时保持与俄罗斯的关系。俄罗斯方面指责西方干预选举。

storyline_timeline.summary:
**习近平抵达平壤开始对朝鲜进行国事访问**

中国国家主席习近平6月8日中午抵达平壤，开始对朝鲜进行为期两天的国事访问。朝鲜最高领导人金正恩在机场亲自迎接，并在金日成广场举行盛大欢迎仪式，鸣放礼炮21响，三军仪仗队高呼“祝习近平同志身体健康”。这是习近平时隔七年再次访朝。

confirmed_claims: 内塔尼亚胡欲连任，六成以色列民众不看好
据凤凰卫视报道，以色列总理内塔尼亚胡所属的利库德集团6月10日宣布，内塔尼亚胡将参加今年大选，寻求连任。这一表态是在美国总统特朗普对内塔尼亚胡的政治未来表示不确定后作出的。

clusters.headline: 内塔尼亚胡宣布将参加今年大选寻求连任
clusters.summary: 以色列利库德集团6月10日宣布，总理内塔尼亚胡将参加今年最迟于10月举行的大选，寻求连任。此前美国总统特朗普表示不确定内塔尼亚胡是否会参选。民调显示61%的以色列民众认为内塔尼亚胡不应参选，其执政联盟难以获得多数席位。
clusters.headline_en: Netanyahu announces he will run in this year's election seeking re-election
clusters.summary_en: Israel's Likud party announced on June 10 that Prime Minister Netanyahu will run in the general election, to be held no later than October this year, seeking re-election. Earlier, US President Trump said he was unsure whether Netanyahu would run. Polls show that 61% of Israelis believe Netanyahu should not run, and his ruling coalition is unlikely to secure a majority.

storyline_timeline.summary:
**菲律宾棉兰老岛附近海域发生7.8级强震，已致37人死亡**

6月8日上午，菲律宾南部棉兰老岛附近海域发生7.8级地震，震源深度约40公里。截至6月9日，已造成37人死亡，千余次余震。震中附近城市桑托斯将军城受灾严重，多处建筑倒塌，电力中断，机场暂停运营。海啸监测到最高1.4米浪高，日本发布海啸预警并疏散4.5万人。

clusters.headline: 习近平对朝鲜进行国事访问，深化中朝传统友谊
clusters.summary: 中共中央总书记、国家主席习近平应朝鲜劳动党总书记金正恩邀请，于6月8日至9日对朝鲜进行国事访问。双方就深化中朝关系、加强战略沟通达成重要共识。习近平强调中朝传统友谊不会改变，金正恩表示将发展朝中关系作为国家最重大战略。
clusters.headline_en: Xi Jinping pays state visit to North Korea, deepening traditional China-North Korea friendship
clusters.summary_en: Xi Jinping, General Secretary of the Communist Party of China Central Committee and President of the People's Republic of China, paid a state visit to North Korea from June 8 to 9 at the invitation of Kim Jong Un, General Secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea. The two sides reached important consensus on deepening China-North Korea relations and strengthening strategic communication. Xi emphasized that the traditional China-North Korea friendship will not change, and Kim expressed that developing DPRK-China relations is the country's most important strategy.

clusters.summary: 美国中央司令部于6月10日对伊朗境内多个军事目标发动新一轮打击，称此举是对伊朗“无端且持续侵略行为”的回应。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队随后宣布打击霍尔木兹海峡附近美国船只，并关闭该海峡。双方冲突升级，威胁到此前脆弱的停火协议。
clusters.headline_en: US launches new airstrikes on Iran, Iran closes Strait of Hormuz and strikes US bases
clusters.summary_en: The US Central Command launched a new round of strikes on multiple military targets inside Iran on June 10, saying it was a response to Iran's "unprovoked and sustained aggressive acts." Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps subsequently announced strikes on US vessels near the Strait of Hormuz and closed the strait. The escalation of conflict between the two sides threatens the previously fragile ceasefire agreement.

clusters.summary: 伊朗武装部队6月11日发表声明，以地区安全局势不稳为由，宣布自即日起关闭霍尔木兹海峡，禁止任何类型船只通行，并称违规船只将遭打击。此举是对美军此前打击伊朗境内目标的回应。美国中央司令部称已完成对伊朗的新一轮打击。
clusters.headline_en: Iran announces closure of Strait of Hormuz, banning all vessel passage
clusters.summary_en: On June 11, the Iranian Armed Forces issued a statement citing unstable regional security, announcing the immediate closure of the Strait of Hormuz, banning any type of vessel passage, and stating that violators would be attacked. This move is a response to the US military's previous strikes on targets inside Iran. The US Central Command stated that it has completed a new round of strikes against Iran.
